claims.text: DeepSeek-V2 is a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model.
DeepSeek-V2 is characterized by economical training.
DeepSeek-V2 is characterized by efficient inference.
DeepSeek-V2 activates 21B parameters for each token.
DeepSeek-V2 supports a context length of 128K tokens.
DeepSeek-V2 adopts the Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) architecture.
Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) guarantees efficient inference by significantly compressing the Key-Value (KV) cache into a latent vector.
DeepSeekMoE enables training strong models at an economical cost through sparse computation.
Compared with DeepSeek 67B, DeepSeek-V2 achieves significantly stronger performance.
Compared with DeepSeek 67B, DeepSeek-V2 saves 42.5% of training costs.
Compared with DeepSeek 67B, DeepSeek-V2 reduces the KV cache by 93.3%.
Compared with DeepSeek 67B, DeepSeek-V2 boosts the maximum generation throughput to 5.76 times.
DeepSeek-V2 is pretrained on a high-quality and multi-source corpus consisting of 8.1T tokens.
DeepSeek-V2 is further trained with Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to fully unlock its potential.
DeepSeek-V2 is further trained with Reinforcement Learning (RL) to fully unlock its potential.
Even with only 21B activated parameters, DeepSeek-V2 achieves top-tier performance among open-source models.
Even with only 21B activated parameters, DeepSeek-V2's chat versions achieve top-tier performance among open-source models.

theses.text: DeepSeek-V2 is a Mixture-of-Experts language model that achieves top-tier performance among open-source models while activating only 21B of its 236B total parameters.

DeepSeek-V2's Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA) and DeepSeekMoE architectures enable economical training and efficient inference by compressing the Key-Value cache into a latent vector and using sparse computation.

Compared with DeepSeek 67B, DeepSeek-V2 delivers significantly stronger performance while saving 42.5% of training costs, reducing the KV cache by 93.3%, and boosting maximum generation throughput to 5.76 times.
